'''鈭歜-n-k-r''' ('''kabankeroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:justificate|justificate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-n-k-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:justificate|justificate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-n-k-r
|-
! Lemma
| kabankeroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibankeroko|thibankeroko]] || [[word:jibankeroko|jibankeroko]] || [[word:shibankeroko|shibankeroko]] || [[word:kibankeroko|kibankeroko]]
